name: GraphQL Voyager
when_to_use: 需要把 GraphQL SDL 展开成可缩放、可追踪字段关系的全景图时用它,而非手写节点连线——原生手写在类型展开、Relay 包装裁剪、边路由和大 schema 导航上失败。非做任意知识图谱、查询执行或 resolver 性能分析。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能复述 SDL 或画少量 Mermaid 边,做不到从完整 schema 建立可导航类型图、字段侧栏、Relay 降噪和根类型切换；Voyager 把这些高歧义关系稳定收进同一视图。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to expand GraphQL SDL into a zoomable overview whose field relationships can be traced, instead of hand-writing nodes and edges. Native implementations fail on type expansion, Relay-wrapper pruning, edge routing, and navigation of large schemas. It is not for arbitrary knowledge graphs, query execution, or resolver performance analysis.
en.why_valuable: AI can only restate SDL or draw a few Mermaid edges by default. It cannot build a navigable type graph, field sidebar, Relay noise reduction, and root-type switching from a complete schema. Voyager keeps these ambiguous relationships stable in one view.

data_in.note: boot uses upstream sdlToSchema to turn data_in.sdl into a GraphQLSchema, then passes it as Voyager.introspection. This is not a generic {nodes,edges} graph. An existing introspection response can also be passed directly to Voyager's introspection prop, but its exact shape must be {data:{__schema:...}}.

schema.sdl: string - complete SDL parseable by GraphQL buildSchema; must include a query root type

displayOptions?.rootType?: string - defaults to the query root type name

spec.note: Voyager's graph and sidebar depend on a sized parent container. boot defaults to an explicit height of 560px and width 100%; vh and percentage heights are prohibited. Its SVG pan/zoom view handles container-width changes, but the host must still provide a nonzero clientWidth.

data_in.note: boot 用上游 sdlToSchema 把 data_in.sdl 转为 GraphQLSchema,再作为 Voyager.introspection 传入；这不是通用 {nodes,edges} 图。若已有 introspection 响应,也可直接给 Voyager 的 introspection prop,其精确形态必须是 {data:{__schema:...}}。

schema.sdl: string —— 可由 GraphQL buildSchema 解析的完整 SDL,必须含 query 根类型

displayOptions?.rootType?: string —— 默认 query 根类型名

spec.note: Voyager 的图面与侧栏依赖有尺寸的父容器；boot 默认显式 height 560px、宽度 100%,禁止 vh/百分比高。容器宽变化由其 SVG pan/zoom 视图处理,宿主仍须保证非零 clientWidth。

example._why: GraphQL 类型、字段与根类型构成深且高歧义的图 config；minimal 同时钉死 SDL 输入和 Voyager displayOptions。

minimal.sdl: type Query { book(id: ID!): Book } type Book { id: ID! title: String! author: Author } type Author { id: ID! name: String! books: [Book!]! }

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:需允许 jsDelivr ESM 与 voyager.css；静态 CSS 必须进 head
carriers.widget: conditional:必须把 voyager.css 放 shadow,并用 Emotion CacheProvider 将 MUI 动态样式定向到同一 shadowRoot
carriers.codex: supported:iframe 内 React/ESM/SVG pan-zoom,无必需 worker/wasm/uplink

isolation.evidence: 1MB 单包(document.* 被别名化,负计数不可信):硬证据 createElement('style')=1(Emotion/MUI 注样式)+ new Worker=1(graphviz 布局 worker,另触 CSP worker-src);entry 自身 widget boot 引 @emotion/react CacheProvider + @emotion/cache container:shadowRoot 重定向样式并把 voyager.css 落 shadow——正是 MUI-in-shadow 标准手法,反证 Emotion 默认注 head。document.body/addEventListener 字面 grep=0 但因 minify 别名不可信,故 DOM portal(MUI Popover/Settings/DocExplorer 惯例 portal 到 body)与全局事件标 unknown。shadowCompatible=conditional:须 Emotion cache 重定向 + voyager.css 入 shadow,MUI 弹层 DOM 仍可能逃逸 body。
